headline: How The Revvity (RVTY) Narrative Is Shifting With Higher Targets And Tempered Growth Assumptions
summary: Revvity’s fair value estimate has been revised from US$114.63 to US$119.56, a modest uplift that puts fresh attention on where analysts think the stock should trade. That shift lines up with bullish commentary pointing to recovering end markets, early improvement in China and healthier survey data on procedures and CapEx, even as expectations for growth and margins are more restrained. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative might shape the way you track Revvity from...
